scripts.testrail:check-env: node -e "const missing=[]; if(!process.env.TESTRAIL_BASE_URL) missing.push('TESTRAIL_BASE_URL'); if(!process.env.TESTRAIL_USERNAME) missing.push('TESTRAIL_USERNAME'); if(!process.env.TESTRAIL_API_KEY) missing.push('TESTRAIL_API_KEY'); if(missing.length){ console.error('[TestRail] Missing required environment variables for reporting:'); missing.forEach(name => console.error('- ' + name)); process.exit(1); } console.log('[TestRail] Environment is configured for reporting.');"
scripts.test:newman:negative: newman run postman/collection.json -e postman/environment.json --reporters cli,junit --reporter-junit-export test-results/newman-negative-results.xml
scripts.test:newman:positive: newman run postman/positive-clean-collection.json -e postman/environment.json --reporters cli,junit --reporter-junit-export test-results/newman-positive-results.xml
scripts.test:newman: npm run test:newman:positive && npm run test:newman:negative
